diagrams.title: Decision Tree Structure
diagrams.description: Hierarchical tree showing root node, internal decision nodes, and leaf nodes with class predictions
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how decision trees partition feature space into prediction regions

diagrams.title: Entropy vs Probability Curve
diagrams.description: Graph showing entropy, Gini, and classification error as functions of class probability p for binary classification
diagrams.purpose: Compare different impurity measures and their sensitivity to class distribution changes

diagrams.title: Pre-pruning vs Post-pruning Flow
diagrams.description: Two flowcharts comparing pre-pruning (early stopping) and post-pruning (grow then prune) strategies
elements: Pre-pruning: Check criteria → Stop or Split
Post-pruning: Full tree → Evaluate subtrees → Prune or Keep
diagrams.purpose: Understand different approaches to prevent overfitting in decision trees
